name: native
description: Sutra Native v1.1.0 — runtime-active founder workflow engine for Claude Code. SessionStart hook auto-activates the engine; founder input flows H-Sutra log → HSutraConnector → Router (deterministic + optional LLM fallback) → LiteExecutor (synchronous step_graph runner) → RendererRegistry (8 default terminal renderers) → SUCCESS Execution. Ships compiled dist/ + bin/sutra-native CLI + library exports (@sutra/native main/exports/types) + D3 starter kit (5 Domains, 6 Charters, 10 Workflows including W-onboarding-tour, 5 TriggerSpecs) + SBOM-v1.1.0.txt. 1207 contract+integration tests; 5 codex master reviews folded inline. Intake dependency: install core@sutra first so H-Sutra events land in the JSONL log Native subscribes to. Deferred to v1.2: full Temporal-backed executor (current LiteExecutor is no-Temporal synchronous); advanced operator skills.
